flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trinidad State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Trinidad State College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (41.4% → 54.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Trinidad State College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 1.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trinidad State College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $7.3k).
